visual_description: A group of people in dark clothing walks down a narrow, dimly lit wooden corridor with stone walls and railings. They are moving forward in a line, with one person slightly ahead of the others, their faces partially visible under the low lighting. Their postures are upright and purposeful, with no discernible gestures or facial expressions visible.
